title: Front Office Manager - Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India:
Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India!
